texto: Do you know why I believe in the Lord Jesus and what He says? Because He has proved to me that He has my best interests at heart. What could He do that He did not do? He already gave His life for us (Romans 5:8-10
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de 8:32) que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “Do you know why I believe in the Lord Jesus and what He says? Because He has proved to me that He…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, david-jeremiah, believe, com foco em reflexao.
